recent_tools.output:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""List available Gemini models to find image generation models."""

import os
import sys

# Load API key
with open("P:/__csf/.env") as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.startswith("GEMINI_API_KEY="):
            key = line.strip().split("=", 1)[1]
            os.environ["GEMINI_API_KEY"] = key
            break

import google.generativeai as genai

genai.configure(api_key=os.environ["GEMINI_API_KEY"])

print("=" * 60)
print("Available Gemini Models")
print("=" * 60)

# List models - this returns a generator, not a list
models = genai.list_models()

# Convert to list first
models_list = list(models)

# Look for image-capable models
print("\n🔍 Searching for image generation models...\n")

image_models = []
for m in models_list:
    model_name = m.name
    # Filter for image generation capable models
    if "image" in model_name.lower() or "flash" in model_name.lower() or "vision" in model_name.lower():
        image_models.append(m)
        print(f"✓ {model_name}")
        if hasattr(m, "display_name"):
            print(f"  Display: {m.display_name}")
        if hasattr(m, "description"):
            print(f"  Description: {m.description}")
        print()

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print(f"Found {len(image_models)} image-capable models")
print("=" * 60)

# Also show first 15 models for reference
print("\n📋 First 15 available models:\n")
for i, m in enumerate(models_list[:15]):
    print(f"{i+1}. {m.name}")
